name: Auto Ninja
author: Poki
description: Auto Ninja is a fast-paced action platformer where precision and quick thinking are your best allies! Run, dodge, and jump your way through all the deadly chambers packed with traps, spikes, and tricky puzzles. You'll need sharp reflexes and clever moves to survive and collect every coin. Can you conquer every floor and prove you're the ultimate ninja? How to play Auto Ninja? Click or tap any key to jump. Hold to jump higher. Who created Auto Ninja? Auto Ninja is created by Omni Play. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Auto Ninja for free? You can play Auto Ninja for free on Poki. Can I play Auto Ninja on mobile devices and desktop? Auto Ninja can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
